themes.label: Kingdom

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "How do impossible expectations create false guilt in modern systems?". Word-study detail reinforces "רֵיחֵ֗נוּ: because ye have made our savour - odor (as if blown)".
